[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10011000 3
1 11011111 7
2 00100001 2
3 10110001 4
4 01111010 5
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00001000 1

01 10 00000000 a match 5 6
12 21 00001000 1 match 7
23 32 10011000 3 match 0
34 43 10011000 3 match 0
45 54 00000001 1
56 65 00100001 2 match 2
67 76 00110000 2
70 07 00000010 1

02 20 10000010 2
13 31 00001000 1 match 7
24 42 10011010 4
35 53 00000000 a match 5 6
46 64 10010001 3
57 75 00100000 1
60 06 10000001 2
71 17 00001000 1 match 7

03 30 10000000 1
14 41 00001000 1 match 7
25 52 00000000 a match 5 6
36 63 10010000 2
47 74 01011010 4
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 00000000 a match 5 6
72 27 00011010 3

04 40 10000111 4
15 51 00000000 a match 5 6
26 62 10010000 2
37 73 00011000 2
